title: rosa × collina var. sylvestris
intro: Rosa × collina var. sylvestris, also known as the wild rose or dog rose, is a fragrant, climbing rose plant that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. sylvestris include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Rosa × collina var. sylvestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
